acceptance-test/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
acceptance-test/pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 21 features will fail to compile if source/target remains at 17.

acceptance-test/pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit release configuration to Maven compiler plugin for Java 21.
acceptance-test/pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures bytecode compatibility and API usage is restricted to Java 21, preventing runtime issues on older runtimes or compile errors if legacy flags conflict.
